title: CIRCLES OF CARE - 211info
text: HOOD RIVER VALLEY ADULT CENTER CIRCLES OF CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a wide range of services to assist with daily needs including help with everyday chores, grocery shopping, light housework, yard work, local transportation, and friendly check-ins. Services are provided by volunteers and program accepts new volunteers's. 2010 Sterling Place Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Supportive services: Age 55 and older Volunteers: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 386-2060 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 397-4759 Ext: 0724 Message Phone Intake (541) 386-2060 Rita Rathkey [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information or visit website to complete a Client Services Request or Volunteer form FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Cascade Locks, Hood River, Mosier, Odell, and Parkdale (zip code 97041) Services: Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Older Adults Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services * Older Adults Housekeeping Assistance * Older Adults In Person Reassurance/Monitoring Programs * Older Adults Local Automobile Transportation * Older Adults Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Older Adults Telephone Reassurance * Older Adults Volunteer Opportunities Yard Maintenance * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOOD RIVER VALLEY ADULT CENTER
